description: Skill taxonomy for the Vietnamese construction sector covering project management, design & architecture, construction workers, construction sales, and other roles. Includes VN-specific regulatory requirements (TCVN/QCVN standards, Luật Xây dựng, Nghị định 15/2021, 06/2021, 10/2021, PCCC regulations) and Vietnam-specific tools (GXD/FAST dự toán, Hệ thống đấu thầu quốc gia, MISA).
